sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: IT stocks led by TCS, Infosys slump 5.25% as AI threat triggers global software rout | Business News
feed.summary: Indian IT stocks, including giants like TCS and Infosys, experienced a significant drop of 5.25% at market opening, reacting to a global software market downturn. This slump is attributed to the emerging threat of Agentic AI, which is perceived to potentially disrupt the current business models of Indian IT companies. The Nifty IT index fell sharply, pulling down the benchmark Nifty 50 as well.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of T1 Energy Inc. - TE
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential claims on behalf of investors of T1 Energy Inc. (NYSE: TE) following a short report by Culper Research. The report described T1 as a "Failed EV Battery SPAC," causing the company's stock price to drop by 5.56%. The investigation focuses on whether T1's officers and/or directors engaged in securities fraud or unlawful business practices.

feed.title: 5 Insightful Analyst Questions From Philip Morris's Q4 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Philip Morris International's Q4 results were strong, driven by double-digit volume growth in its smoke-free products like IQOS, ZYN, and VIVE. The article highlights key analyst questions from the earnings call, focusing on future smoke-free growth, competitive dynamics in Japan, pricing strategy, U.S. ZYN promotions, and potential impacts of state-level nicotine pouch taxation. Management addressed these concerns, emphasizing ongoing strategic growth and innovation.
